catalog_content:
Item Name: Tostacos Ramo y Maizitos (24 pack) Tortilla spicy chips Colombian Snack Colombian food products Colombian snack food Colombian snacks Colombian gifts mekato colombiano
Bullet Point 1: Tostacos is the perfect spicy chip made in Colombia.
Bullet Point 2: Snacks made with the best selected corn, without preservatives, naturally free of trans fats.
Bullet Point 3: For over 30 years, Productos Ramo has been bringing smiles to the faces of snack lovers and dessert lovers with each and every bite
Bullet Point 4: That it is the first corn tortilla made for Colombians, puffed up and crunchy, which is part of the tradition of a country.
Bullet Point 5: Great for some on-the-go energy, as an afternoon snack, for dessert after a meal or simply as comfort food, treats from Ruufe come in a wide variety of shapes, colors and tastes
Product Description: There may be some tortilla chips out there or nachos chips on the market, but none like Tostacos de Ramo, which have been present in the hearts of Colombians since 1982, when the traditional Mexican food appetizer was at its best. What makes the Ramo family's pioneering snack special? That it is the first corn tortilla made for Colombians, puffed up and crunchy, which is part of the tradition of a country. In fact, that is where the name of the product comes from, from the union of the roasting process to which our tacos are subjected. Snacks made with the best selected corn, without preservatives, naturally free of trans fats. Find them in their two flavors: spicy and cheese. Enjoy them in their presentations: individual, family and assortment x 12. (2 pck are sold together and each pack comes with 12 - 24 Total) Perfect for spicy lovers, familiy reunion, adult parties, piñatas, birthdays. Podrán existir en el mercado tortillas de chip, nachos o totopos pero ninguno como los Tostacos de Ramo que están presentes en el corazón de los colombianos desde 1982, cuando el tradicional aperitivo de la comida mexicana pasaba por su mejor momento. ¿Qué hace especial al pasabocas pionero de la familia Ramo? Que es la primera tortilla de maíz hecha para los colombianos, infladita y crujiente, que forma parte de la tradición de un país. De hecho es allí donde surge el nombre del producto, de la unión del proceso de tostado al que son sometidos nuestros tacos. Pasabocas elaborados con el mejor maíz seleccionado, sin conservantes, naturalmente libre de grasas trans. Encuéntralos en sus dos sabores: picante y queso. Disfrútalos en sus presentaciones: individual, familiar y surtido x 12. (2 paquetes de 12 cada uno son vendidos juntos. Para un total de 24 paquetes vendidos. Especial para reuniones, piñatas, fiestas, reuiones de familia, cumpleaños).
Value: 10.5
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Colombian snack brand offering traditional corn-based tortilla chips. Positioned as a mid-range snack with natural claims and no preservatives. Bundle deal packaging suggests value pricing. Brand heritage and cultural relevance may justify slight premium over generic chips.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Special Tea It's 5 o'clock Somewhere Rooibos Tea, 20 Tea Bags Bullet Point 1: ROOIBOS TEA: Rooibos is a caffeine free alternative tea which offers similar health benefits to tea without the caffeine. Rooibos teas come from the Cedarburg area of the Western Cape of South Africa. Bullet Point 2: EARTHY FLAVOR: Green Rooibos has an earthly fresh character similar to pan fired green teas. Red rooibos has a robust mineral earthy body similar to black tea. Honeybush has as smooth sweet honey like character similar to a dark oolong. Bullet Point 3: CAFFEINE LEVEL: Rooibos tea does not contain caffeine and has low tannin levels compared to black tea or green tea. Rooibos contains is packed full of polyphenols similar to tea. Bullet Point 4: REAL LOOSE LEAF TEA IN BAGS: Loose leaf tea is a healthier purer way to drink tea, we gently breakup our loose leaf teas for use in eco-friendly tea bags to help retain full flavor. Bullet Point 5: PREMIUM LOOSE LEAF TEA: Premium tea leaves have all their essential oils intact, so the flavor, quality and health benefits are maintained. Individually hand packed in the USA in a resealable pouch to retain freshness. Product Description:

Sweet and sunny citrus taste, perfect for any time of the day!

Loose Leaf Brewing Instructions: Bring cold water to just under a boil (180° - 190°). Pour hot water over tea bag or 1 heaping teaspoon of tea leaves and steep 4-6 minutes.

Ingredients: Rooibos, Honeybush, Raisins, Lemon Peel, Orange Peel, Apple Bits (Apples, Safflower, Sunflower and/or Canola Oil, Corn Syrup, Sugar, Maltodextrin, Modified Corn Starch, Citric Acid, Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C), Natural Flavoring, Caramel Color), Pineapple Bits (Sugar Cane (Thailand), Pineapples, Citric Acid (Max 1%)), Blackberry Leaves, Hibiscus, Natural and Artificial Flavor.

Value: 20.0 Unit: Count
overall_summary: Premium loose-leaf tea positioned as a high-quality, health-conscious product with organic and natural certifications. The resealable pouch and hand-packing in the USA suggest attention to freshness and quality. The inclusion of multiple fruit ingredients and a citrus flavor profile may justify a higher price point compared to standard tea bags.
